input_schema.hcom_message_example: hcom send --name <sender> "@research-pipeline-claude-3 extract: <input_id>; input=outputs/<input_id>/01_ingest/v1.txt; schema=schemas/02_extract.json; produce options/A,B,C then report to @research-pipeline-claude-6"

process.description: Option A (entity-first): maximize entity coverage. People/orgs/concepts first, then facts and quotes that mention them. Compose extraction JSON.
Write options/A/v1.json + options/A/v1.meta.json via write_artifact + write_meta.
Option B (fact-first): maximize fact coverage. Atomic claims with evidence quotes, then entities and quotes. Compose extraction JSON.
Option C (quote-first, if max_options >= 3): maximize verbatim quotes with attribution. Compose extraction JSON.
Send all paths to @critic with the request: 'score each option 0-1, pick the best, copy to stage root as v1.json, then run validator on the winner'.

examples.lifted_from: single-winner variant (the actual run produces 3 options)

self_check.check: Each option matches schemas/02_extract.json (entities/facts/quotes arrays present)
Entities quality: each entity has name (minLength 1), type (enum), mentions (integer >=0); no 'various people' vague entities
Facts quality: each fact has claim (atomic 1-sentence) + evidence_quote (short quote); no unsourced claims
Quotes quality: each quote is verbatim with attribution; no paraphrasing
3 options visibly different (different prioritization, not just renamed)
No stage-root v1.json or v1.meta.json written by this agent
Each option has a sibling v1.meta.json with validation: pending and producer: 'extractor'

common_failures.fix: Copy a verbatim span from the source
Regenerate; option A entity-dominant, B fact-dominant, C quote-dominant
Critic tiebreaks: highest schema+completeness score wins; document in feedback

failure_modes.name: Input text is empty
failure_modes.handling: Write all options as {entities:[], facts:[], quotes:[]} with meta.feedback='empty input'. Critic will fail; orchestrator halts.

failure_modes.name: Input is non-textual (numbers, code, etc.)
failure_modes.handling: Extract what's there; don't try to invent entities.

failure_modes.name: Input is too long (>50K tokens)
failure_modes.handling: Focus on the first 50K and note in meta.feedback.

refactor_delta.current_state: 3-approach detail (A/B/C) in this spec's Process section. scripts/smoke_v2.py only exercises a single 'winner' variant, not the 3-option case.
refactor_delta.target_state: A 3-option smoke variant exercises pick_winner end-to-end.
concrete_steps: Keep the 3 approaches in this spec's Process section (already moved).
Add a 3-option variant to scripts/smoke_v2.py (build options/A/v1.json, B/v1.json, C/v1.json with deliberately different shapes; assert pick_winner picks correctly).
